hooks.command: if [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then printf '%s' '{"decision":"allow","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. Prefer graphify query for focused questions (scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md) over grepping raw files; read GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture context."}'; else printf '%s' '{"decision":"allow"}'; fi
